groups.label: Procurement, tenders, and awards
groups.search_guidance: Search first for new tenders, contract awards, framework agreements, budget releases, and award notices. Treat procurement portals and official award notices as primary evidence.

groups.label: Official ministries, agencies, and IT providers
groups.search_guidance: Search official account sites for press releases, programme updates, strategy documents, CIO/CDO announcements, IT service-provider milestones, and budget decisions.

groups.label: Policy and regulatory sources
groups.search_guidance: Search policy and regulatory sources for implementation deadlines, AI Act guidance, digital sovereignty programmes, cloud policy, and federal/state digitalisation initiatives.

groups.label: Cyber, AI, cloud, and public-sector trade sources
groups.search_guidance: Search specialist and trade sources for leads on cyber, AI, cloud, OZG, sovereignty, and public-sector IT developments. Use these as leads and verify factual claims against official sources before inclusion.
